---
title: "shadow_forge.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/sentinel/wardens/shadow_forge.py"
loc: 146
complexity: 11
logic_score: 1.95
style_score: 3.71
intel_score: 4.14
overall_score: 3.42
---

## Intent
Autonomous neural guardian monitoring system drift and anomalies.

## Interaction Protocol
Instantiate the Warden class and call evaluate(graph) with a compiled matrix graph.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 20 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.base](file://src.sentinel.wardens.base)

### Exports
- `ShadowForgeWarden`
- `__init__`
- `_get_docker_executable`
- `execute_cycle`
- `_promote_from_container`
